meanings.definition: a structure that provides privacy and protection from danger
protective covering that provides protection from the weather

examples: they were huddled together for protection
he enjoyed a sense of peace and protection in his new home

meanings.definition: a way of organizing business to reduce the taxes it must pay on current earnings
temporary housing for homeless or displaced persons

examples: After the earthquake, the government could not provide shelter for the thousands of homeless people

meanings.definition: invest (money) so that it is not taxable
